idea: Weekly Google Trends Surge In 'Home Appliance Repair' Searches Signals Bullish Consumer Discretionary
behavior: An increase in DIY appliance repair searches indicates rising consumer stress on appliance replacements, boosting sales in home improvement and retail discretionary sectors.

market_impact.rationale: Consumers delaying appliance replacement but buying parts or services benefits discretionary retailers and specialty repair companies.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long on XLY if weekly Google Trends for 'home appliance repair' rises 15%+ week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if the search interest declines 10% from peak

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Search interest fluctuates frequently with seasonal and economic stress factors.

idea: Daily Spike In Google Trends Searches For 'Truck Driver Shortage' Signals Bullish Industrials
behavior: A surge in searches around truck driver shortages suggests tightening labor supply, which often precedes freight pricing power and industrial logistics strength.

market_impact.rationale: Tight driver labor markets increase freight rates and benefit industrial transportation firms.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long on XLI when daily Google Trends for 'truck driver shortage' rises 20%+ compared to 5-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if searches drop below 5-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor shortages and related news cycles frequently spike search interest.

idea: Weekly FRED Series Jump In Producer Price Index Signals Bearish Basic Materials

data.source: FRED Producer Price Index (PPI) weekly derived

behavior: A sudden increase in PPI signals rising input costs that compress margins for basic materials companies.

market_impact.rationale: Higher input costs reduce profitability in commodity and materials sectors.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short on XLB if weekly PPI rises by more than 0.7% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when PPI growth slows below 0.2% weekly

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: PPI data often has periodic jumps reflecting commodity price shocks.

idea: Daily Surge In RSS Counts For Labor Union Strike Mentions Signals Bearish Financials

data.source: RSS news feed counts for labor union strike mentions

behavior: Spike in labor strike mentions increases perceived business risk and credit risk, pressuring financial sector stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Labor disruptions raise operational risk and credit costs for financial institutions.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short on XLF if daily RSS count for 'labor strike' mentions doubles compared to 10-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when mention volume drops below average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor disputes and strikes regularly generate news spikes.

idea: Weekly Google Trends Surge In 'Home Energy Bill Shock' Signals Bullish Utilities
behavior: Rising searches for energy bill shock indicate consumer stress driving higher utility consumption and political pressure for rate hikes.

market_impact.rationale: Utility companies benefit from rising rates and demand during energy cost shocks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long on XLU if weekly Google Trends for 'energy bill shock' rises 20%+ week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when search interest drops 10% from peak

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Energy price volatility and consumer concern cycles frequently drive search spikes.

idea: Daily Spike In USGS Earthquake Activity Near Key Ports Signals Bearish Industrials

data.source: USGS earthquake activity near major ports

behavior: Sudden increase in seismic activity near major ports can disrupt supply chains, hurting industrial and logistics sector stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Port disruptions reduce throughput and increase logistics costs for industrial companies.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short on XLI if daily earthquake count near major ports exceeds 3 events (magnitude >3.0)
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or when activity returns to baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seismic events near ports occur regularly and can cluster.

behavior: Increasing DIY auto repair interest indicates cost-conscious consumers delaying professional repairs, boosting retail parts and tools sales.

market_impact.rationale: Retailers supplying auto parts and tools benefit from increased DIY repair activity.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long on XLY if weekly Google Trends for 'DIY auto repair' rises 15%+ week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if search interest drops below 10% growth

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: DIY repair interest fluctuates seasonally and with economic stress.

idea: Daily Spike In RSS Counts For Warehouse Automation Failure Signals Bearish Industrials

behavior: News spikes about warehouse automation failures raise concerns about logistics efficiency risks, pressuring industrial sector stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Failures in warehouse automation can delay shipments and increase costs.

trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when mentions revert below average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Automation glitches and failures are regularly reported and cause news volume spikes.

idea: Daily Surge In EV Charger Installations Signals Bullish Communication Services
behavior: Rapid increase in new EV charger installations indicates accelerating electric vehicle adoption and related telecom infrastructure demand.

market_impact.rationale: EV growth drives demand for telecom and connected vehicle technologies in communication services.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long on XLC if daily new EV charger installations increase by 25%+ compared to 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 10 trading days or if installations fall below 7-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: EV infrastructure growth is accelerating with periodic surges.

trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if search interest reverts below 15% growth

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor unrest news cycles generate regular search interest spikes.

idea: Daily Spike In Local Weather Heatwave Signals Bullish Utilities
behavior: Sudden heatwaves increase electricity demand for cooling, boosting utility sector revenues.

market_impact.rationale: Heat spikes drive higher power consumption and utility billing.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long on XLU if daily max temperature exceeds 95°F and is 10°F above 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or if temperatures normalize

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Heatwaves are seasonal and frequently occur with sudden spikes.
